race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Daily Faller Insurance 'Junior' National Hunt Flat Race (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed frenati at position 3 (15.0% probability) vs top pick Red Metal (38.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~23.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Red Metal > Goliath Flight, but actual result was Frenati > Equi Libre. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Frenati had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -3.2%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
